security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri:; img-src 'self' tauri: data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://127.0.0.1:8765; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: OmniAgent master control panel for SAP session orchestration.
bundle.longDescription: OmniAgent is the desktop control panel for the OmniFrame multi-session SAP agent. It supervises up to six concurrent SAP GUI sessions, surfaces live job telemetry, streams console output, and dispatches quick actions against the local agent runtime.
